top_signals.title: Chinese Firm Seeks $2.6 Billion Loan for Hong Kong Data Center
top_signals.summary: Chinese data center operator Range Intelligent Computing Technology Group Co. is seeking a loan of around HK$20 billion ($2.6 billion) to fund what would be Hong Kong’s largest computing facility, people familiar with the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 'Dr. Doom'-backed Atlas Capital CEO says bitcoin could crash 70% before reaching $500,000
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
